ferritin_less_than_15.description: Serum ferritin below 15 ng/mL, indicating depleted iron stores

ferritin_greater_than_100.description: Serum ferritin above 100 ng/mL, essentially excludes iron deficiency

ferritin_greater_than_300.description: Serum ferritin above 300 ng/mL, suggestive of iron overload

transferrin_saturation_less_than_16.description: Transferrin saturation below 16%, indicating insufficient iron delivery to marrow

transferrin_saturation_greater_than_45.description: Transferrin saturation above 45%, screening threshold for iron overload

iron_elevated.description: Serum iron above upper limit of normal

elevated_methylmalonic_acid.description: Methylmalonic acid elevated, specific for B12 deficiency

elevated_homocysteine.description: Serum homocysteine elevated above normal range

tsh_elevated.description: TSH above upper limit of normal (>4.0 mIU/L)

tsh_greater_than_10.description: TSH markedly elevated above 10 mIU/L, indicating overt hypothyroidism

tsh_suppressed.description: TSH below lower limit of normal (<0.1 mIU/L)

lid_lag.description: Upper eyelid lags behind globe during downward gaze

exophthalmos.description: Protrusion of the eyeball from the orbit

tremor_fine.description: Fine postural tremor of outstretched hands

pretibial_myxedema.description: Non-pitting edema of anterior lower legs, specific to Graves disease

delayed_ankle_reflex.description: Prolonged relaxation phase of ankle deep tendon reflex

high_anion_gap_metabolic_acidosis.description: Anion gap >12 mEq/L with metabolic acidosis

elevated_osmolal_gap.description: Difference between measured and calculated osmolality >10 mOsm/kg

calcium_oxalate_crystals_in_urine.description: Calcium oxalate crystals seen on urinalysis

cortisol_am_greater_than_18.description: Morning cortisol above 18 mcg/dL, essentially excludes adrenal insufficiency

failed_cosyntropin_stimulation.description: Cortisol fails to rise above 18 mcg/dL at 30-60 minutes after cosyntropin injection

failed_dexamethasone_suppression.description: Morning cortisol >1.8 mcg/dL after 1mg overnight dexamethasone

elevated_24h_urine_free_cortisol.description: 24-hour urine free cortisol above upper limit of normal

elevated_midnight_salivary_cortisol.description: Late-night salivary cortisol above normal, indicating loss of diurnal rhythm

hyperpigmentation.description: Darkening of skin, especially in palmar creases, buccal mucosa, and scars

purple_striae.description: Wide (>1 cm) purple/violaceous striae on abdomen, axillae, or thighs

calcium_elevated_with_pth_elevated.description: Elevated calcium with simultaneously elevated or inappropriately normal PTH

calcium_elevated_with_pth_suppressed.description: Elevated calcium with appropriately suppressed PTH (<20 pg/mL)

pth_high_normal.description: PTH in upper normal range (50-65 pg/mL), inappropriately normal if calcium is high-normal

alt_greater_than_10x_uln.description: ALT elevated more than 10 times the upper limit of normal

ast_alt_ratio_greater_than_2.description: AST to ALT ratio greater than 2:1

alp_elevated_with_normal_ggt.description: Elevated alkaline phosphatase with normal GGT, suggesting bone origin

alp_elevated_with_elevated_ggt.description: Elevated ALP with elevated GGT, confirming hepatobiliary origin

direct_bilirubin_elevated.description: Conjugated (direct) bilirubin elevated, indicating impaired excretion

gamma_glutamyl_transferase_elevated.description: GGT above upper limit of normal

alkaline_phosphatase_elevated.description: Alkaline phosphatase above upper limit of normal

bilirubin_total_elevated.description: Total bilirubin above upper limit of normal (>1.2 mg/dL)

haptoglobin_borderline_low.description: Haptoglobin in low-normal range (31-50 mg/dL), suspicious for subclinical hemolysis

complement_c4_borderline_low.description: Complement C4 in low-normal range (10-16 mg/dL), suggestive of early classical pathway consumption

ldh_elevated.description: Lactate dehydrogenase above upper limit of normal

reticulocyte_count_elevated.description: Reticulocyte count above 2.5%, indicating marrow erythropoietic response

schistocytes_on_smear.description: Fragmented red blood cells seen on peripheral blood smear

positive_direct_coombs_test.description: Direct antiglobulin test positive, indicating antibody/complement on RBC surface

platelets_less_than_50000.description: Severe thrombocytopenia with platelets below 50 x10^9/L

d_dimer_normal.description: D-dimer within normal range (<0.5 mcg/mL FEU)

troponin_elevated.description: Cardiac troponin I or T above 99th percentile URL with rise/fall pattern

bnp_greater_than_500.description: BNP above 500 pg/mL, strongly suggests heart failure

bnp_less_than_100.description: BNP below 100 pg/mL, essentially excludes heart failure

nt_probnp_greater_than_900.description: NT-proBNP above 900 pg/mL in adults under 75

nt_probnp_less_than_300.description: NT-proBNP below 300 pg/mL, strong negative predictor for acute HF

ck_greater_than_10x_uln.description: Creatine kinase elevated more than 10 times upper limit of normal

ck_greater_than_5x_uln.description: Creatine kinase elevated more than 5 times upper limit of normal

myoglobin_elevated.description: Serum myoglobin above upper limit of normal

crp_greater_than_10.description: C-reactive protein above 10 mg/L, suggesting significant inflammation or infection

procalcitonin_greater_than_2.description: Procalcitonin above 2 ng/mL, high likelihood of bacterial sepsis

procalcitonin_less_than_0_25.description: Procalcitonin below 0.25 ng/mL, bacterial infection unlikely

anti_dsdna_borderline_high.description: Anti-dsDNA antibody in upper normal range (15-25 IU/mL), suggestive of early autoimmune process

antinuclear_antibody_titer_elevated.description: Antinuclear antibody titer at or above upper limit of normal (borderline positive)

anti_dsdna_antibody_elevated.description: Anti-dsDNA antibody at or above upper limit of normal (borderline positive)

anti_smith_positive.description: Anti-Smith antibody positive, highly specific for SLE

low_complement_c3_c4.description: Both complement C3 and C4 low, indicating classical pathway activation

low_c3_normal_c4.description: Low C3 with normal C4, suggesting alternative pathway activation

protein_gap_elevated.description: Total protein minus albumin >4 g/dL (globulin gap), suggesting monoclonal protein

m_spike_on_spep.description: Monoclonal spike on serum protein electrophoresis

gfr_less_than_15.description: GFR below 15 mL/min/1.73m2, indicating kidney failure (CKD stage 5)

gfr_less_than_60.description: GFR below 60 mL/min/1.73m2, indicating at least CKD stage 3

proteinuria_nephrotic_range.description: Urine protein >3.5 g/day or urine protein:creatinine ratio >3.5

rbc_casts_in_urine.description: Red blood cell casts seen on urinalysis, pathognomonic for glomerulonephritis

psa_4_to_10.description: PSA in 4-10 ng/mL range (diagnostic gray zone)

lipase_greater_than_3x_uln.description: Lipase elevated more than 3 times upper limit of normal

amylase_greater_than_3x_uln.description: Amylase elevated more than 3 times upper limit of normal

lipase_to_amylase_ratio_greater_than_2.description: Lipase to amylase ratio greater than 2, more specific for pancreatitis

ttg_iga_greater_than_10x_uln.description: tTG-IgA elevated more than 10 times upper limit of normal

hba1c_greater_than_6_5.description: HbA1c at or above 6.5%, diagnostic of diabetes mellitus

sodium_less_than_130.description: Serum sodium below 130 mEq/L, moderate hyponatremia

urine_sodium_greater_than_40_with_hypona.description: Urine sodium >40 mEq/L in setting of hyponatremia, suggesting renal sodium wasting

urine_osmolality_greater_than_100_with_l.description: Inappropriately concentrated urine (>100 mOsm/kg) in setting of low serum osmolality

adamts13_less_than_10.description: ADAMTS13 activity below 10%, diagnostic of TTP

plasma_free_metanephrines_elevated.description: Plasma free metanephrines above upper limit of normal

plasma_free_metanephrines_greater_than_3.description: Plasma free metanephrines above 3 times upper limit of normal

igf1_elevated.description: Insulin-like growth factor 1 elevated for age/sex

growth_hormone_not_suppressed_by_ogtt.description: Growth hormone fails to suppress below 1 ng/mL after 75g oral glucose load

kayser_fleischer_rings.description: Golden-brown copper deposits in Descemet membrane of cornea on slit-lamp examination

anti_mitochondrial_antibody_positive.description: Anti-mitochondrial antibody (AMA) positive, highly specific for PBC

malar_rash.description: Butterfly-shaped erythematous rash over malar eminences sparing nasolabial folds

oral_ulcers.description: Usually painless oral or nasopharyngeal ulcers

photosensitivity_rash.description: Skin rash developing after sun exposure disproportionate to normal sunburn

morning_stiffness_greater_than_1_hour.description: Joint stiffness lasting more than 1 hour after waking, improving with activity

symmetric_polyarthritis_small_joints.description: Symmetric inflammation of small joints (MCPs, PIPs, wrists, MTPs)

rheumatoid_nodules.description: Subcutaneous nodules, typically over extensor surfaces/pressure points

janeway_lesions.description: Painless erythematous macules on palms and soles from septic microemboli

osler_nodes.description: Painful, raised violaceous nodules on fingertips from immune-complex vasculitis

splinter_hemorrhages.description: Linear red-brown streaks under the fingernails

new_murmur_with_fever.description: New or changing cardiac murmur in setting of persistent fever

blood_cultures_positive_typical_organism.description: Blood cultures positive for typical endocarditis organism (S. aureus, viridans strep, enterococcus, HACEK) in multiple sets

vegetation_on_echo.description: Oscillating intracardiac mass on valve or supporting structures on echocardiography

chvostek_sign.description: Facial muscle twitching when tapping over facial nerve anterior to ear

trousseau_sign.description: Carpopedal spasm after inflating BP cuff above systolic pressure for 3 minutes

fruity_breath.description: Fruity or acetone odor on breath

dark_urine_with_positive_dipstick_blood_.description: Dark brown urine testing positive for blood on dipstick but no RBCs on microscopy

urine_dipstick_blood_positive_no_rbcs.description: Urine dipstick positive for blood without RBCs on microscopy (myoglobinuria or hemoglobinuria)

pica_pagophagia.description: Craving and chewing ice (pagophagia), a specific form of pica

glossitis.description: Smooth, swollen, tender tongue with loss of papillae

subacute_combined_degeneration.description: Combined dorsal column and corticospinal tract dysfunction (loss of proprioception/vibration + upper motor neuron signs)

hypersegmented_neutrophils.description: Neutrophils with â‰¥5 lobes (or any with â‰¥6 lobes) on peripheral blood smear

acanthosis_nigricans.description: Dark, velvety skin thickening, typically in skin folds (neck, axillae)

asterixis.description: Flapping tremor of outstretched hands, negative myoclonus

spider_angiomata.description: Central arteriole with radiating vessels, blanches and refills from center

caput_medusae.description: Dilated periumbilical veins radiating from umbilicus

palmar_erythema.description: Reddening of the palms, especially thenar and hypothenar eminences

periorbital_edema_morning.description: Puffiness around eyes, worse in morning, improving throughout day

dermatitis_herpetiformis.description: Intensely pruritic papulovesicular eruption on extensor surfaces, symmetric

epigastric_pain_radiating_to_back.description: Epigastric abdominal pain with radiation to the back

chest_pain_substernal_pressure.description: Substernal chest pressure or tightness, especially with exertion

chest_pain_pleuritic.description: Sharp chest pain worsening with inspiration

s3_gallop.description: Third heart sound, a low-pitched sound in early diastole

elevated_jvp.description: Jugular venous pressure elevated above 4 cm above sternal angle

hepatojugular_reflux.description: Sustained JVP elevation >3 cm with 30 seconds of right upper quadrant abdominal pressure

paroxysmal_nocturnal_dyspnea.description: Waking from sleep with acute dyspnea, relieved by sitting upright

orthopnea.description: Dyspnea when lying flat, relieved by sitting up

ammonia_elevated.description: Serum ammonia above upper limit of normal

st_elevation_on_ecg.description: ST segment elevation in contiguous leads on electrocardiogram

new_lbbb_with_chest_pain.description: New left bundle branch block in setting of chest pain

rouleaux_formation.description: Red blood cells stacked like coins on peripheral blood smear

howell_jolly_bodies.description: Nuclear remnants in red blood cells, indicating functional asplenia

target_cells.description: Red blood cells with central and peripheral hemoglobin and a ring of pallor between them

non_anion_gap_metabolic_acidosis.description: Metabolic acidosis with normal anion gap (hyperchloremic)

urine_ph_greater_than_5_5_with_acidosis.description: Urine pH >5.5 in setting of systemic metabolic acidosis, indicating impaired urinary acidification

pancytopenia.description: Simultaneous decrease in all three blood cell lineages

low_epo_with_erythrocytosis.description: Low erythropoietin level in setting of elevated hemoglobin/hematocrit

aquagenic_pruritus.description: Pruritus triggered by contact with water, especially warm water

erythromelalgia.description: Burning pain and redness of extremities, especially hands and feet

foamy_urine.description: Urine that appears foamy or frothy, suggesting proteinuria

bronze_skin.description: Bronze or slate-gray skin discoloration from iron deposition

second_third_mcp_arthropathy.description: Arthropathy predominantly affecting 2nd and 3rd metacarpophalangeal joints

sickle_cells_on_smear.description: Sickle-shaped (crescent) red blood cells on peripheral blood smear

weight_loss_with_polydipsia_polyuria.description: Unintentional weight loss combined with increased thirst and urination

diffuse_goiter.description: Uniform enlargement of entire thyroid gland

cortisol_am_low.description: Morning cortisol below lower limit of normal (fallback finding)

adrenocorticotropic_hormone_elevated.description: ACTH elevated above upper limit of normal, suggesting primary adrenal insufficiency

glucose_low.description: Blood glucose below lower limit of normal (hypoglycemia)

eosinophils_absolute_elevated.description: Absolute eosinophil count above upper limit of normal

blood_urea_nitrogen_elevated.description: BUN above upper limit of normal, suggesting prerenal azotemia or renal dysfunction

bicarbonate_low.description: Serum bicarbonate below lower limit of normal (metabolic acidosis)

sodium_low.description: Serum sodium below lower limit of normal (hyponatremia)

glucose_elevated.description: Blood glucose above upper limit of normal (hyperglycemia)

chloride_elevated.description: Serum chloride above upper limit of normal (hyperchloremia)

phosphorus_low.description: Serum phosphorus below lower limit of normal (hypophosphatemia)

white_blood_cells_elevated.description: WBC count above upper limit of normal (leukocytosis)

hemoglobin_a1c_elevated.description: HbA1c above upper limit of normal (suggesting chronic hyperglycemia)

potassium_low.description: Serum potassium below lower limit of normal (hypokalemia)

bicarbonate_elevated.description: Serum bicarbonate above upper limit of normal (metabolic alkalosis)

glomerular_filtration_rate_low.description: GFR below lower limit of normal (fallback finding for mild impairment)

creatine_kinase_elevated.description: Creatine kinase above upper limit of normal (fallback finding)

aspartate_aminotransferase_elevated.description: AST above upper limit of normal (fallback finding)

alanine_aminotransferase_elevated.description: ALT above upper limit of normal (fallback finding)

potassium_elevated.description: Serum potassium above upper limit of normal (hyperkalemia)

phosphorus_elevated.description: Serum phosphorus above upper limit of normal (hyperphosphatemia)

creatinine_elevated.description: Serum creatinine above upper limit of normal (elevated GFR marker)

erythrocyte_sedimentation_rate_elevated.description: ESR above upper limit of normal (fallback finding for moderate elevation)

hemoglobin_low.description: Hemoglobin below lower limit of normal (anemia)

calcium_low.description: Serum calcium below lower limit of normal (hypocalcemia)

uric_acid_elevated.description: Serum uric acid above upper limit of normal (hyperuricemia)

prothrombin_time_elevated.description: Prothrombin time prolonged above upper limit of normal

complement_c3_low.description: Complement C3 below lower limit of normal

complement_c4_low.description: Complement C4 below lower limit of normal

hemoglobin_high.description: Hemoglobin above upper limit of normal. In PV, elevated hemoglobin is the defining feature (WHO 2016 major criterion).

osmolality_serum_low.description: Serum osmolality below lower limit of normal (<275 mOsm/kg), indicating hypotonic hyponatremia consistent with SIADH.

blood_urea_nitrogen_low.description: BUN below lower limit of normal, reflecting dilutional effect and increased renal clearance in SIADH.

uric_acid_low.description: Uric acid below lower limit of normal, reflecting increased renal clearance characteristic of SIADH.

albumin_low.description: Serum albumin below LLN reflecting hepatic synthetic failure in cirrhosis.

creatine_kinase_mb_elevated.description: CK-MB above upper limit of normal (>5 ng/mL). Classic AMI biomarker with faster rise/fall than troponin. Especially useful for detecting reinfarction.

platelets_low.description: Platelets below lower limit of normal, reflecting immune-mediated platelet destruction in SLE

white_blood_cells_low.description: White blood cells below lower limit of normal (leukopenia), commonly reflecting lymphopenia in active SLE

lymphocytes_absolute_low.description: Absolute lymphocyte count below lower limit of normal, the most prevalent initial laboratory abnormality in active SLE

osmolality_serum_high.description: Serum osmolality above ULN (>295 mOsm/kg), hallmark of HHS

reticulocyte_count_low.description: Hypoproliferative reticulocyte count — hallmark of marrow failure

pth_low.description: PTH below lower limit of normal — defining feature of hypoparathyroidism. Distinguishes from other causes of hypocalcemia where PTH is elevated (secondary hyperparathyroidism).

total_cholesterol_elevated.description: Hyperlipidemia from compensatory hepatic lipoprotein synthesis

alkaline_phosphatase_low.description: Alkaline phosphatase below lower limit of normal — paradoxically low in Wilson disease despite liver involvement

classic_triad_headache_sweating_palpitat.description: Classic triad of episodic headache, diaphoresis, and palpitations in a hypertensive patient

diaphoresis.description: Excessive sweating, typically episodic and associated with catecholamine surges

pallor.description: Pallor during paroxysms, due to catecholamine-induced vasoconstriction (distinguishes from flushing syndromes)

esr_elevated.description: ESR above upper limit of normal, reflecting systemic inflammation

crp_elevated.description: CRP above upper limit of normal, reflecting acute-phase inflammation
